zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Alexander Montgomerie Master of Montgomerie於1428年出生在蘇格蘭貝維其可爾時，他的父親Alexander Montgomery 1st Lord Montgomerie47歲，母親Lady Margaret Boyd Baroness Montgomerie15歲。他於1445年與Lady Elizabeth Hepburn在蘇格蘭艾斯爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1456年在英國蘇格蘭貝維其可爾享年29歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Alexander Montgomerie Master of Montgomerie于1428年出生在苏格兰貝維其可爾时，他的父亲Alexander Montgomery 1st Lord Montgomerie47岁，母亲Lady Margaret Boyd Baroness Montgomerie15岁。他于1445年与Lady Elizabeth Hepburn在苏格兰艾斯爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1456年在英国苏格兰貝維其可爾享年29岁，埋葬在苏格兰米德洛迪安。

nameMeanings.name: Montgomerie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, Scottish: Scottish spelling of   Montgomery  .

variants.name: Montgomery
meanings: English, Scottish, and northern Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Sainte-Foy-de-Montgomery and Saint-Germain-de-Montgomery (Calvados). In Ireland this surname was present in the medieval period, died out, and was then reintroduced from Scotland in the 17th century. It has been Gaelicized in Ireland as Mac Iomaire and in Scotland as Mac Gumaraid.

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Alexander Montgomerie Master of Montgomerie was born in 1428, in Berwickshire, Scotland, his father, Alexander Montgomery 1st Lord Montgomerie, was 47 and his mother, Lady Margaret Boyd Baroness Montgomerie, was 15. He married Lady Elizabeth Hepburn in 1445, in Ayrshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He died about 1456, in Berwickshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 29, and was buried in Midlothian, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Alexander Montgomerie Master of Montgomerie est né en 1428, à Berwickshire, Écosse, son père, Alexander Montgomery 1st Lord Montgomerie, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Boyd Baroness Montgomerie, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Lady Elizabeth Hepburn en 1445, à Ayrshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé environ 1456, à Berwickshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 29 ans, et a été enterré à Midlothian, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Alexander Montgomerie Master of Montgomerie 1428 in Berwickshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alexander Montgomery 1st Lord Montgomerie 47 und seine Mutter Lady Margaret Boyd Baroness Montgomerie 15. Er hat 1445 in Ayrshire, Scotland Lady Elizabeth Hepburn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb um 1456 im Alter von 29 Jahren in Berwickshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Midlothian, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Alexander Montgomerie Master of Montgomerie è nato il nel 1428 nel Berwickshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Alexander Montgomery 1st Lord Montgomerie, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Lady Margaret Boyd Baroness Montgomerie, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Lady Elizabeth Hepburn nel 1445, nel Ayrshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì circa 1456, nel Berwickshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 29 anni, e fu sepolto a Midlothian, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Alexander Montgomerie Master of Montgomerieが1428年にスコットランドバーウィクシュアイアで生まれた時，父Alexander Montgomery 1st Lord Montgomerieは47歳，母Lady Margaret Boyd Baroness Montgomerieは15歳であった。1445年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアでLady Elizabeth Hepburnと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は約1456年にイギリススコットランドバーウィクシュアイアで29歳で死去し，スコットランドミドロスアンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Alexander Montgomerie Master of Montgomerie(이)가 1428년 스컷랜드 버윅실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alexander Montgomery 1st Lord Montgomerie(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margaret Boyd Baroness Montgomerie(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1445년 스컷랜드 에이르실르에서 Lady Elizabeth Hepburn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1456년 영국 스코틀랜드 버윅실르에서 29세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 미들로스이언에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Alexander Montgomerie Master of Montgomerie nasceu em 1428, em Berwickshire, Scotland, seu pai, Alexander Montgomery 1st Lord Montgomerie, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Boyd Baroness Montgomerie, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Elizabeth Hepburn em 1445, em Ayrshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1456, em Berwickshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 29 anos, e foi sepultado em Midlothian, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Alexander Montgomerie Master of Montgomerie родился в 1428 г. в местности бирвиккшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Alexander Montgomery 1st Lord Montgomerie было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Boyd Baroness Montgomerie, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Elizabeth Hepburn в 1445 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер около 1456 г. в местности бирвиккшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 29 лет и был похоронен в местности мидлотян, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Alexander Montgomerie Master of Montgomerie nació en 1428, en Berwickshire, Scotland, su papá, Alexander Montgomery 1st Lord Montgomerie, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret Boyd Baroness Montgomerie, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Lady Elizabeth Hepburn en 1445, en Ayrshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1456, en Berwickshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 29 años, y fue sepultado en Midlothian, Scotland.
